title: rubus × reduncus
intro: Rubus × reduncus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the Fragaria and Rubus species, exhibiting characteristics from both parent plants. The medicinal properties of Rubus × reduncus include its high antioxidant content, which helps protect against cell damage and inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × reduncus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Rubus × reduncus include teas, jams, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote digestive health.
